name: Telegram bot companion launch and notification flows
description: Add the companion bot flows that make TMA distribution useful: launch entry points, shareable invite links, and finance notifications that route back into the Mini App when needed.

planned: Keep the bot as a launch/share/notification surface instead of a CRUD replacement UI.
Start with a worker-hosted bot adapter boundary and extract later only if webhook, retry, or notification-scale evidence demands it.
Support invite-link and budget-alert flows that return the user into the Mini App with the right intent.
Document operational boundaries for bot token handling, rate limits, and outbound failure handling.

notes: This feature should start only after the core TMA client can authenticate and route deep links safely.
